title: Rhys Rustad-Elliott
text: Home * People * Rhys Rustad-Elliott Rhys Rustad-Elliott [1] Rhys Rustad-Elliott , a Canadian software engineer with an undergraduate degree in computer science from University of Toronto , and computer chess programmer. He is author of the UCI compliant open source chess engine Shallow Blue . On his blog, Rhys Rustad-Elliott gave an excellent description of Magic Bitboards as used in Shallow Blue [2] .
